name: World.inc
description: Led engineering team of frontend and smart-contract developers, establishing architecture standards and development processes. Architected scalable frontend infrastructure to handle real-time market data streams, improving system responsiveness for high-volume trading environments. Implemented core trading features including one-click trading, real-time chart updates, and high-frequency UI interactions on a centralized exchange platform.

name: EVAA Protocol
description: Engineered MVP for a TON blockchain-based lending protocol, incorporating Rust-based smart contracts for cross-chain operations with Solana. Optimized frontend and backend performance, reducing application load times by 63% through targeted code refactoring. Delivered DeFi platform features under tight deadlines during rapid development cycles and hackathon competitions.

name: Supa Doge
description: Developed smart contracts on NEAR blockchain, integrating with gaming backend systems to support interactive features. Built Solidity contracts for Ethereum interoperability, enabling cross-platform functionality. Independently designed and launched production-ready MVP frontend within three weeks.

name: NRBoom
description: Built backend system to process neuroheadset signal data using high-load scoring algorithms, ensuring reliable real-time analysis. Designed APIs that reduced AI team development time by approximately 20%, streamlining integration and collaboration across teams.

name: Free-Scribe
description: AI-powered tool to transcribe and translate audio recordings using React and transformer models to automate multilingual content processing.

name: Droplify
description: Dropbox-style file storage platform with Next.js, Clerk authentication, and Drizzle ORM for secure, scalable data management.

name: Calendoor
description: Calendly-inspired scheduling SaaS using Next.js and serverless database architecture for efficient appointment booking.

name: SwoleFit
description: Web application to generate personalized fitness programs, integrating user data for customized recommendations.

name: Pumpgram
description: Minimalistic gym weight tracking tool to simplify progress monitoring for users.

name: r_wp
description: High-performance Rust web parser leveraging Reqwest for fast data extraction and processing.

name: tp_codec
description: TypeScript codec implemented in Rust, enabling efficient data encoding and decoding across languages.
